jobs.title: Draft an email reinder to all parents who took registration forms with them, they should attach copy of Birth Certificate for Enrollment Process completion
jobs.description: Create a very simple mail draft to send to to all new parents joining at all campuses to attach a copy of birth certificate on the application forms.
jobs.result_note:
DRAFT EMAIL — awaiting your approval before sending.

Subject: Action Required: Birth Certificate Copy for Enrollment Completion

Dear Parent/Guardian,

Thank you for choosing Silverleaf for your child's education.

To complete your child's enrollment, please attach a copy of their Birth Certificate to the application form before submitting it.

This is required for all students joining at any of our campuses. Without it, we are unable to finalise the registration.

If you have already submitted your form, kindly bring or send a copy of the Birth Certificate to your campus office at your earliest convenience.

Should you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Warm regards,
Silverleaf School Administration

---

jobs.title: Draft reply to Mrs. Fatuma
jobs.description: Mrs. Fatuma called asking about school fees and the enrollment deadline for her daughter joining Grade 3. Fees are 450,000 TZS per term. Enrollment deadline is July 31st. She also asked if there is a sibling discount (there is not).
jobs.result_note:
DRAFT EMAIL — awaiting your approval.

Subject: Enrollment Enquiry - Grade 3 Admission

Dear Mrs. Fatuma,

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding your daughter's enrollment at Silverleaf.

I am happy to share the following details:

School Fees: The fees for Grade 3 are 450,000 TZS per term.

Enrollment Deadline: To secure your daughter's place, all enrollment documents must be submitted by 31st July 2026.

Regarding a sibling discount — we do not currently offer a sibling discount, but we would be glad to discuss payment plan options if that would be helpful.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any further questions. We look forward to welcoming your daughter to Silverleaf.

Warm regards,
Silverleaf School Administration

---

jobs.title: Send a text reminder to all Partner Organizations to complete their 2nd Term Fee Payments and to collect their student's gate pass on saturday.
jobs.description: I want you to send a text reminder to all the partner with Kids at the school to complete their 2nd term payments and if possible by Saturday to visit the campus to collect gate passes for their kids to be in class.
jobs.result_note:
DRAFT TEXT MESSAGE — awaiting your approval before sending.

Dear Partner,

This is a reminder from Silverleaf School. We kindly ask you to complete your 2nd Term fee payment at your earliest convenience.

Additionally, please visit the campus this Saturday to collect your child's gate pass, which is required for access to class.

For any queries, please contact our administration office. Thank you.

Silverleaf School Administration
